appraisal_events.evidence: « Je crois que j’ai eu tort dans cette affaire du collier... En tout cas, quoi qu’il arrive je ne veux pas qu’elle me prenne pour un mufle, je cours chez Boucheron chercher le collier. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narration highlights Robert’s self-reproach and eager capitulation to make amends, which lowers his local emotional leverage.

status_effects.explanation: Robert’s self-blame and rush to retrieve the necklace place him in a submissive, self-diminished position in relation to his mistress.
